judgment.summary: Rapidly growing, highly profitable semiconductor company trading at a premium valuation with strong analyst support.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat estimates by 5.8%; next earnings date is 2026-08-04.
positives: Revenue growth 37.8% YoY and Earnings growth 91.2% YoY indicate strong top and bottom-line expansion.
Gross margin 53.1% and Profit margin 13.4% demonstrate healthy profitability.
Free cash flow $7.17B TTM shows robust cash generation.
Analyst consensus is 'strong buy' with a mean target of $472.17, suggesting upside potential.
Forward P/E of 33.34 is reasonable given the high growth estimates of 76.6% for the fiscal year.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 144.03 and Price/Sales of 18.81 indicate a very high valuation.
Debt/Equity ratio of 6.00 is high, though offset by significant cash and free cash flow.
Return on equity of 8.1% is modest relative to the company's growth profile.
Beta of 2.40 suggests high volatility relative to the broader market.

news.paragraph: With no recent headlines to guide sentiment, Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) presents a purely fundamental picture for traders. The company is scheduled to report its next earnings on August 4th, which may serve as a catalyst. Until then, price action will likely be driven by analyst expectations and broader market trends.

examples.body: $NBIS $JTAI $NVDA $AMD Not only is JTAI invested in SPACEX IPO via PSV, they are one of the largest investors in AI Canadian infrastructure properties.
